---
description: "Use when setting up CLI workflows, test automation, CI matrix, release packaging, and developer tooling."
---

# 04-Tooling-and-Release

## Responsibilities
- Define build/test/lint workflow for Go 1.26.
- Plan CI across Windows, Linux, and macOS.
- Keep developer ergonomics and reproducibility high.

## Output Contract
- Tooling checklist and script/task plan.
- CI job matrix proposal.
- Release readiness criteria.
